title: Introducing Gemini 3.5 Live Translate
summary: Google DeepMind introduced Gemini 3.5 Live Translate, a speech-to-speech translation model supporting 70+ languages with real-time multilingual translation and automatic language switching. The tool is available to developers via the Gemini API and enables live dubbing of video content with natural-sounding output.
writeup: The video introduces Gemini 3.5 Live Translate, a speech-to-speech translation model from Google DeepMind that supports more than 70 languages with real-time multilingual translation and automatic language switching. It covers availability through the Gemini API for developers and demonstrates live dubbing of video content with natural-sounding output. The takeaway is a single model handling translation, automatic language detection, and voice output in one pipeline, accessible programmatically.
